case_title: HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES, PROF. CORP. VS. CLAIR P. ANDRUS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-20-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES, PROF. CORP. REPRESENTED BY VAL HORNSTEIN, PRINCIPAL. DEFENDANT CLAIR P. ANDRUS DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT PORTER PRESCOTT INC. DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A PROTEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PROTEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-20-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES PROF CORP. REPRESENTED BY VAL HORNSTEIN PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT CLAIR P. ANDRUS DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT PORTER-PRESCOTT INC. DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $398.05 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRUS, CLAIR P. PORTER-PRESCOTT, INC.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: JOSHUA A RIDLESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES, PROF. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER-PRESCOTT, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PORTER-PRESCOTT, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES, PROF. CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES, PROF. CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDRUS, CLAIR P. PORTER-PRESCOTT, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
